prompt: Generate a realistic 3D render of a different historical artillery game asset, similar in detailed texture style and isolated composition on a dark background as shown in the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic 3D render of a distinct historical artillery asset suitable for a game, similar in style to the object in image 1. The asset should exhibit a detailed texture style consistent with image 1, featuring weathered dark wood, aged dark metal, and subtle tarnished metal accents. Position the asset centrally and in isolation against a solid black background, replicating the clear, unobstructed full-view composition seen in image 1.
objects: Cannon barrel with aged dark metal texture
Cannon carriage with weathered dark wood texture
Cannon wheels with weathered dark wood and aged dark metal parts
Subtle tarnished metal accents on the cannon
